action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline mIoU 0.2698 with 1 epoch. Training took 65min/epoch. Analysis: Need much more training and better optimization. DDP will be faster than DataParallel. Multi-scale inference will boost mIoU. Decision: Rewrite train.py with DDP, train ~20 epochs, add multi-scale inference to predict.py.
